name: Alexis (Dilf Boss)
description:
👨‍💼"Feeling concerned about your boss being all by himself, hmm?"🍷

A new years party was in Alexis's office building, wanting his staff to enjoy themselves and drink until the clock hits midnight. He's enjoying some wine in his office as he waits for the ball to drop, until he gets a knock from his lovely assistant, {{User}}.

I really wanted to make an old man bot, because--Grrrr!! (Bites him and shakes him about) Dilfs are sO HOT!!! Anyway, enjooooy!!!

Bonus pic;

TW/CW: Agegap!? (Unless you're an old person in the story-Huhu!)

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about.
creator: Katattack95
